title: Analyze Signal Handling & Process Lifecycle
description: Analyze the mechanisms of signal handling in Node.js, including `SIGTERM` and `SIGINT` events. Master the graceful termination of stateful connections and ongoing operations during process shutdown. Design robust process lifecycle management strategies for Node.js applications.
objectives: Analyze the mechanisms of signal handling in Node.js, including `SIGTERM` and `SIGINT` events.
Master the graceful termination of stateful connections and ongoing operations during process shutdown.
Design robust process lifecycle management strategies for Node.js applications.
